value.found_quote: Agent Skills let you upload and reuse versioned bundles of files in hosted and local shell environments. ... A skill is a versioned bundle of files plus a `SKILL.md` manifest (front matter + instructions). Skills are modular instructions you can use to codify processes and conventions, from company style guides to multi-step workflows.
value.rationale: The page explicitly describes OpenAI's "Agent Skills" as versioned bundles of files (plus a SKILL.md manifest with instructions) that can be uploaded, reused, and mounted into both hosted (container-based) and local shell environments — matching all key elements of the claim. The page provides detailed API endpoints, code examples, versioning/management details, and safety guidance, all consistent with a generally available (active) feature. No preview or beta language is used.
